title: Verify existing implementation of timestamp-middleware
description: Middleware and tests already exist at src/middleware/timestamp-middleware.ts and src/middleware/timestamp-middleware.test.ts. All 7 tests pass. Middleware adds x-timestamp header in ISO 8601 format, calls next handler, and follows existing middleware patterns (factory function returning interface with middleware property).
existing_patterns: src/middleware/request-logger.ts - Factory pattern with config object, returns interface with middleware method
